message:
fix: use configured credentials and context timeout in perf_dolt.go (bd-c1g8)

runDoltServerDiagnostics was hardcoding root:@tcp(...) as DSN, bypassing
configured user and BEADS_DOLT_PASSWORD env var. Now resolves credentials
from config and environment, matching openDoltDB in dolt.go.

Also replaces bare context.Background() with context.WithTimeout (30s)
so diagnostic queries cannot hang indefinitely against a slow server.

Executed-By: beads/polecats/jasper
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
